remember: Students will be able to recall the major challenges faced by India during the process of nation building.
Students will be able to list and explain the reasons for the difficulties encountered by India during the integration of princely states.
Students will be able to describe the role of the Constituent Assembly in addressing the challenges of nation building.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of nation building and its importance in the context of India's independence.
Students will be able to analyze the key challenges that India faced during the process of nation building and their impact on the country.
Students will be able to understand the significance of the Constituent Assembly's efforts in addressing the challenges of nation building.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of the challenges of nation building to understand the complexities of the Indian state.
Students will be able to use the concepts of nation building to evaluate the impact of different policies and decisions on the country's development.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the role of different actors, including the Constituent Assembly, the government, and civil society, in addressing the challenges of nation building.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different approaches to nation building and their impact on the country's development.

ncert_objectives: Explain the challenges of nation building and their impact on India.
Describe the role of the Constituent Assembly in addressing the challenges of nation building.
Discuss the reasons for the difficulties encountered by India during the integration of princely states.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the significance of the Constituent Assembly in addressing the challenges of nation building.
Discuss the challenges faced by India during the process of nation building and their impact on the country's development.
Evaluate the effectiveness of different approaches to nation building and their impact on India's development.
